title: Aditya Birla Finance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Aditya Birla Finance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Aditya Birla Finance is actively seeking a talented and motivated Credit Analyst to join our dynamic team in Ghaziabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Aditya Birla Finance:
Aditya Birla Finance is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aditya Birla Finance!
